Description:
Ballistics of the OFU-46 HE-Frag round fired from the the B-13 130mm gun. These guns were employed by the PRC, with the OFU-46 locally produced as the WB702P.

Soviet ammunition includes ZS-56(P) time fuzed (radio proximity fuzed) air-burst fragmentation shell, F-56 high explosive shell, SB-56 star shell, PB-56 anti-radar shell, and various other miscellaneous types. The WB702P weighs 34.17 kg, loads 11.6 kg of 27/1-15 and 27/1-23 grains of pyroxylin propellant, develops 870 m/s from 3050 kgf/cm^2 (335 MPa) peak breech pressure. Projectile travel measures 5199 mm, Chamber volume is 17.5 L, cartridge space measures 1057mm high.

References:
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《中国舰艇工业历史资料丛书》，中国船舶工业总公司，1993
- Энциклопедия отечественной артиллерии, А. Б. Широкорад; Под общ. ред. А.Е. Тараса., Минск : Харвест, 2000
